description: Batch-index approved documents into QuickML RAG. This ensures controlled, scheduled updates to the knowledge base without continuous retraining.

schedule.description: Runs daily at 3:00 AM IST (after analytics update at 2 AM)

target_function.name: ingest_index
target_function.note: This function is already implemented in ingest_index.py

purpose: Query Data Store for approved, non-indexed documents
Send to QuickML RAG for indexing
Mark documents as indexed in Data Store

batch_configuration.note: Process in batches to avoid timeouts. If more than 100 documents are pending, next run will process the rest.

success_notification.template: Nightly indexing completed. {indexed_count} documents indexed. {errors_count} errors.

note: Indexing job can run for up to 30 minutes

error_handling.description: If a single document fails to index, log the error and continue with remaining documents

why_nightly_batch: Prevents continuous model retraining (AI does not learn from every upload immediately)
Allows human review before knowledge base update (quality control)
Reduces computational load by batching operations
Provides a clear audit trail (when each document was indexed)
Enables rollback if bad data is detected (by removing from index)
Aligns with police workflow (documents uploaded during day, indexed at night)
